stackConfig.stackChoiceComment: REVERTED to flux-photoreal because Fal does not have an SDXL LoRA training endpoint (only inference). The earlier sdxl-stylized config pointed at fal-ai/fast-sdxl-lora-training which doesn't exist — training submissions returned 'Not Found'. Bank stays as the on-canon image source for Spurdo regardless. Generation via FLUX produces polished cartoon output (off-canon) but at least training works. To eventually use SDXL stack: source a Spurdo identity LoRA from an external SDXL trainer (Replicate, civitai trainer, etc.) and add the URL via a future BYO-LoRA-URL flow.

sdxlStackConfigArchived.comment: Saved here for when SDXL training story is sorted (external trainers + BYO URL). Inference endpoint fal-ai/lora is a real working Fal endpoint that supports SDXL with stacked LoRAs. The defaultStyleLoras would re-attach: huggingface.co/victor/MSpaint/SDXL_MSPaint_Portrait.safetensors (MSPaint trigger word, scale 0.9). Quality tags: score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up. Negative tags include 'photo, photorealistic, 3d render, smooth shading, anime, vector'. Guidance 7.0, steps 30.

allowedProvidersComment: Bank stays as the on-canon source. Custom upload for one-offs. Fal now routes through flux-photoreal (training works, output is cartoon-polish — fine because bank covers actual posts).
lockedPromptTemplate: spurdo spärde meme drawn in early internet MS Paint style, doing the action described. The CHARACTER is the focus and the ACTION is clear. SHOW SPURDO'S WHOLE BODY when the scene calls for it (walking, sitting, holding things, etc) — full-body shots are required for action scenes. Spurdo is MALE — never depict him as feminine, never give him human clothes, never give him a dress, skirt, sweater, scarf, blouse, makeup, or any styled outfit. He is a NAKED CARTOON BEAR with brown fur all over his body. NO CLOTHING of any kind. He may hold simple objects (mug, phone, basket) but he never wears them. Brown rounded bean-shaped head with two soft humps on top and a V-crease between them, wavy horizontal forehead wrinkle lines, tiny solid black oval dot eyes with NO white highlights, cream/tan walrus-mustache muzzle made of two oval lobes, small black oval nose centered between the muzzle lobes, big pink open smile below the nose. Body is a short stocky brown bear shape, NAKED with visible brown fur, simple stubby brown arms and legs, simple paws (no fingers, no human hands). Thick uneven black outlines, wobbly hand-drawn edges, no clean vector curves, looks slightly messy and amateur like it was drawn fast with a mouse in 2008. FLAT solid colors only — NO gradients, NO realistic lighting, NO shading. Scene: [SCENE]. The scene should be clearly readable — show props, environment, and what spurdo is doing. Low-resolution screenshot-like feel. NOT polished, NOT vector, NOT 3D, NOT anime, NOT photorealistic, NOT cell-shaded, NOT modern digital art. NO text, NO logos, NO watermarks, NO clothing, NO human gendered styling.
lockedPromptTemplateTags: mspaint, brown bear character, MALE bear, naked bear (no clothes), simple drawing, MS Paint style, amateur drawing, wobbly lines, flat colors, brown fur, cream muzzle, tiny black dot eyes, pink open smile, thick black outlines, [SCENE], low quality on purpose, 2008 internet art, screenshot-like
lockedNegativePrompt: human clothes, dress, skirt, sweater, scarf, blouse, shirt, jacket, hat, makeup, lipstick, eyelashes, female, woman, housewife, feminine, gendered styling, fashion, outfit, costume, anthropomorphic furry character, photorealistic, 3D render, anime, cell-shaded, smooth gradients, polished vector art, modern digital illustration

hardExclusions: Spurdo in any Nazi/SS/extremist uniform or with extremist symbols
Spurdo with modern photo filters (bloom, HDR, teal-orange grading)
Multiple Spurdos in one image (unless explicitly a comic panel)
Text, logos, or tickers inside images
visualCanonChecklist: BROWN rounded bean-shaped head (not round teddy-bear, not anime)
Tiny black dot eyes (no white highlights, no anime sparkles)
Weird stretched face proportions — imperfect on purpose
Thick uneven black outlines, wobbly hand-drawn edges
FLAT solid colors only — no gradients, no shading, no realistic lighting
If body shown: stiff/awkward pose, oversized hands, blob feet
